languages.text: Пар, заполнивший помещение за решеткой, обжигает лицо. Возможно, где-то рядом находятся вентили, регулирующие давление и температуру в трубах.

traits.locale_text: [Draft] Помещение заблокировано из-за риска прорыва труб. Недалеко должны быть вентили для стабилизации давления.
Пар, заполнивший помещение за решеткой, обжигает лицо. Возможно, где-то рядом находятся вентили, регулирующие давление и температуру в трубах.

languages.text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.
languages.original_text: Пар, заполнивший помещение за решеткой, обжигает лицо. Возможно, где-то рядом находятся вентили, регулирующие давление и температуру в трубах.

traits.locale_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.
The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.
The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

languages.text: 格栅另一头房间里弥漫的蒸汽烫得你的脸发疼。附近大概有阀门能调节管道的压力和温度。
languages.original_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

traits.locale_text: 格栅另一头房间里弥漫的蒸汽烫得你的脸发疼。附近大概有阀门能调节管道的压力和温度。

languages.text: El vapor que llena la sala al otro lado de la rejilla te quema la cara. Tal vez haya válvulas cerca para regular la presión y temperatura de las tuberías.
languages.original_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

traits.locale_text: El vapor que llena la sala al otro lado de la rejilla te quema la cara. Tal vez haya válvulas cerca para regular la presión y temperatura de las tuberías.

languages.text: À travers la grille, la vapeur qui sature la pièce au-delà vous brûle le visage. Il y a peut-être des valves à proximité qui permettraient de réguler la pression et la température dans les canalisations.
languages.original_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

traits.locale_text: À travers la grille, la vapeur qui sature la pièce au-delà vous brûle le visage. Il y a peut-être des valves à proximité qui permettraient de réguler la pression et la température dans les canalisations.

languages.text: Izgaranın ötesindeki odayı dolduran buhar, yüzünü yakıyor. Belki yakınlarda boruların basıncını ve sıcaklığını ayarlayacak vanalar vardır.
languages.original_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

traits.locale_text: Izgaranın ötesindeki odayı dolduran buhar, yüzünü yakıyor. Belki yakınlarda boruların basıncını ve sıcaklığını ayarlayacak vanalar vardır.

languages.text: Der Dampf, der den Raum hinter dem Gitter füllt, verbrüht dir das Gesicht. Vielleicht gibt es irgendwo in der Nähe Ventile, die den Druck und die Temperatur der Rohre regulieren.
languages.original_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

traits.locale_text: Der Dampf, der den Raum hinter dem Gitter füllt, verbrüht dir das Gesicht. Vielleicht gibt es irgendwo in der Nähe Ventile, die den Druck und die Temperatur der Rohre regulieren.

languages.text: 火格子の向こうに充満する蒸気が顔をやけどさせる。おそらく、パイプの圧力と温度を調整するバルブが近くにあるのだろう。
languages.original_text: The steam that fills the room beyond the grate scalds your face. Perhaps there are valves somewhere nearby to regulate the pressure and temperature of the pipes.

traits.locale_text: 火格子の向こうに充満する蒸気が顔をやけどさせる。おそらく、パイプの圧力と温度を調整するバルブが近くにあるのだろう。
